series_metadata.series_title: Certificate of Compliance for BWC’s Records Retention Schedules
series_metadata.series_description: ORC 149.33 requires the BWC to annually file the Certificate of Compliance with DAS State Records Administrator. This certificate identifies the status of the BWC’s records program. Reference General DAS schedule GAR-RR-05.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 5 years. ; Paper: Retain 5 years or until scanned, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
